name: Claude 1
lineage_path: McCulloch-Pitts neuron -> Perceptron -> MLP -> RNN -> LSTM -> Seq2Seq -> Transformer -> Claude 1
summary: Claude 1 was Anthropic's first commercially released model, distinguished by its Constitutional AI training approach where the model was guided by a set of principles rather than purely human feedback. It demonstrated that alignment techniques could produce models that were both capable and notably more cautious about harmful outputs, establishing Anthropic as a safety-focused competitor in the frontier model space.
